Sports Teams

Doğuş University offers a wide range of sports facilities. With eighteen sports teams currently in place, new teams are established in line with student demand and as required, and opportunities are provided for them to compete in inter-university championships.

Tryouts for sports teams take place during the second week of the start of each academic year. Students participating in these tryouts, conducted by our expert coaches and trainers, are directed to the relevant disciplines based on their abilities.

Doğuş University Sports Teams:

Sailing Team

The Doğuş University Sailing Team was established in 2014.

Led by our student Yusuf Tunç, our sailing team has earned a well-known and respected place within the national sailing community and the university sailing scene.

Our sailing team regularly participates in inter-university sailing competitions such as the Campuscup, organised by the Marmaris International Yacht Club; the Universail and Jimmy Key Cup, organised by the Urla Sailing Club; as well as competitions organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation and the Istanbul Sailing Club.

Snowboard & Ski Teams

Our Men’s Snowboard Team, competing in the Turkish University Sports       Federation Competitions, KoçSporfest Competitions and Ünilig, earned the       3rd Place Trophy among Istanbul universities at KoçSporfest 2019 thanks       to the rankings achieved in the Snowboard Small Slalom and Snowboard       Giant Slalom in 2019.

Basketball Team

(2023–2024) Our team won the championship in the Promotion League to the Super       League, organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation in       Diyarbakır, and was promoted to the Super League.

(2023–2024) In the 1st Division Basketball Competitions organised by the Turkish       University Sports Federation in Istanbul, our basketball team became the       Istanbul champion.

Our basketball team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation’s       Istanbul 1st Division and University Leagues, won the runners-up trophy       in the Istanbul Basketball 2nd Division in 2018 and was promoted to the       1st Division. Our team continues to compete in the 1st Division.

3x3 Basketball Team

(2022–2023) In the 3x3 Basketball Competitions organised by the Turkish University       Sports Federation on 28–29 April 2023, hosted by Istanbul Technical       University, our team finished third in Istanbul.

Our team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation’s 3x3       Basketball League, finished as runners-up in Turkey in 2018. The Doğuş       University 3x3 Basketball Team is continuing its preparations at full       speed to represent our country at the European Championship to be held in       Porto, Portugal, in 2019.

Dance Team

Our team, which participated in and hosted the 10th Dance Marathon       Competition organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation,       finished as runners-up in Turkey in 2018.

Our dancer, Mahir Karaca, was selected as the best male dancer and won a gold       medal.

Volleyball Team

(2024–2025) In the Promotion League to the Super League organised by the Turkish       University Sports Federation in Antalya, our team finished third and was       promoted to the Super League.

(2024–2025) In the Men’s Volleyball First Division Competitions organised by the       Turkish University Sports Federation in Istanbul, our men’s volleyball       team finished second.

(2024–2025) Our women’s volleyball team finished fourth in the Super League       Volleyball Competitions organised by the Turkish University Sports       Federation in Eskişehir.

(2023–2024) Our women’s volleyball team finished fourth at the Summer Sports Games       organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation in Ankara.

Our volleyball team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation’s       Istanbul 1st League and University Leagues, was promoted to the 1st       League in 2018 after winning the Istanbul Volleyball 2nd League. Our team       continues to compete in the 1st League.

Beach Volleyball Team

Our women’s beach volleyball team, competing in the Turkish University Sports       Federation’s National Championship, reached the semi-finals in 2018 and       finished the championship in fourth place.

Chess Team

Our Chess Team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation       Championship, secured 3rd place at the board in 2018, and our athlete       Özgün Şahin won a gold medal for this achievement.

Table Tennis Team

The team competes in the Turkish University Sports Federation Championship       and the University Leagues.

Football Team

(2023–2024) Our football team finished third in the First Division Football       Competitions organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation in       Istanbul.

Our Football Team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation’s       Istanbul First Division, secured the Third Place trophy in the Istanbul       Football Second Division in 2018, thereby gaining promotion to the First       Division. Our team continues to compete successfully in the First       Division.

Indoor Football Team

(2023–2024) In the 1st Division Indoor Football Competitions organised by the Turkish       University Sports Federation in Istanbul, our indoor football team       finished as runners-up in the 1st Division.

Our team, competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation’s Istanbul       Second Division, was crowned champions of the Second Division in 2019 and       was promoted to the First Division.

Football Tennis Team

The team competes in the Turkish University Sports Federation National       Championship.

Beach Football Team

Competes in the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality Beach Football League.

Muay Thai Team

Our athlete Rıdvan Mert Aydoğan, who competed in the 2019 Turkish University       Sports Federation Muya Thai Championship, won the gold medal as champion       in the 71 kg Elite Division.

Swimming Team

Competing in the Turkish University Sports Federation Turkey Swimming Championship

Kickboxing Team

(2024–2025) Reached the quarter-finals in the individual category at the Turkey       Boxing Championship organised by the Turkish University Sports Federation       in Bayburt on 21 May 2025.

The team competes in the Turkish University Sports Federation Kickboxing       Championship.

Athletics Team

The team is competing in the 100m, 200m, 400m races and the shot put at the       Turkish University Sports Federation Turkish Athletics Championships.

Some of our achievements from the 2021–2022 season:

Third place in the Inter-University Taekwondo Turkey Championships

Wushu: 3 gold medals for the Inter-University Tao Team

Esports: Intel UET VALORANT League Championship – 3rd place

Esports: Intel UET VALORANT League Championship – Championship

Esports: UNIFLICK 2v2 CS:GO Tournament – Championship

Esports: Campus Ambassador Programme Diamond Group 3rd Place

Esports: Intel UET TFT Championship Quarter-Final

Esports: Intel ESPORTS Turkey Rocket League Championship Play-offs

Esports: 3rd place in the Turkish University Sports Federation VALORANT Tournament

Swimming: 4th place in the 400-metre medley category at the Inter-University Turkey      Championships

3x3 Street Basketball: Pin X Dekk Inter-University Champion

Ünilig Men’s Football 1st Division: 3rd in Istanbul

Ünilig Women’s Volleyball Team: 1st place in the Afyon Super League Promotion      Play-offs with four wins out of four. Will compete in the Super League in      the 2022–2023 season

Inter-University Women’s Tennis Team – 4th in Turkey

Turkey Alpine Skiing: 2nd in Turkey

3rd place in the Istanbul Big Slalom category Sailing Team: 2nd place in the      Jimmy Key-Universail Sailing Yacht Race

Sailing Team: 3rd place in the Marmaris Nurolbank Campus Cup Inter-University      Yacht Race

The 3x3 Basketball Team finished second in the Ünilig and qualified for the      European Championship
